# omada_sites (Data Source)

Lists all sites on the Omada Controller.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "omada_sites" "all" {}

output "sites" {
  value = data.omada_sites.all.sites
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `sites` (Attributes List) List of sites. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sites))

<a id="nestedatt--sites"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sites`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) The site ID.
- `name` (String) The site name.
